name: Super Sports Auto Credit & Financing Inc
description_short: Buy Here Pay Here auto dealer in Oklahoma City offering in-house financing for used vehicles with minimal down payments ($1,400+) and flexible credit approval.
description_long:
Super Sports Auto Credit & Financing Inc is a Buy Here Pay Here (BHPH) auto dealership located at 4301 NW 39th in Oklahoma City, OK. The company operates as both a used vehicle retailer and in-house auto financing provider, specializing in serving customers with credit challenges. Founded on the principle that employment history should substitute for traditional credit scores, Super Sports has built its business model around accessibility rather than credit-based gatekeeping.

The company offers in-house auto financing for pre-owned vehicles with down payments starting at $1,400. Their inventory includes used cars, trucks, vans, SUVs, crossovers, and classic automobiles spanning multiple price ranges and model years (2005-2025). Beyond vehicle sales and financing, Super Sports provides automotive service and maintenance, vehicle locating assistance, and online payment processing. They explicitly market to customers with no credit, bad credit, bankruptcy history, first-time buyers, and those with recent divorce.

Super Sports differentiates itself through direct in-house financing (no third-party lenders), a stated focus on customer satisfaction and courteous service, a diverse inventory of quality pre-owned vehicles, and professional service department capabilities. Their marketing emphasizes that "your job is your credit," positioning employment as the primary qualification metric rather than traditional credit reporting.

As a BHPH dealer, Super Sports is fundamentally a vehicle financing and retail operation, not an emergency cash lender. While they serve credit-challenged consumers, their product is auto loans secured by vehicles, typically requiring multi-month or multi-year repayment. The company's success depends on customers' ability to make regular payment commitments and maintain employment, making it suitable for those seeking affordable vehicle ownership rather than emergency liquidity.
pros: Low down payments starting at $1,400, making vehicle ownership accessible to cash-strapped buyers
In-house financing eliminates third-party lender involvement and streamlines approval process
Accepts applicants with no credit, bad credit, bankruptcy, and first-time buyers—populations often rejected elsewhere
Large, quality inventory across multiple vehicle types, years, and price points ($1–$220,000)
On-site service department for maintenance and repairs, reducing customer friction
Employment-based qualification model removes reliance on credit bureau reporting
Online payment processing and appointment scheduling for customer convenience
cons: BHPH model typically involves higher interest rates and weekly/bi-weekly payments rather than traditional monthly terms
Vehicle ownership remains with dealership until full payoff, limiting consumer autonomy
Limited transparency on website regarding APR, payment terms, and total cost of financing
No mention of rate shopping, prequalification, or loan term variability
Dependent on sustained employment; job loss creates immediate repayment hardship
best_for: Customers with poor or no credit history seeking affordable used vehicle ownership
Recent divorcees or bankruptcy filers rebuilding financial stability who need transportation
First-time car buyers without established credit or down payment savings
Employed individuals prioritizing vehicle access over favorable financing terms
diagnosis: Super Sports is best for employed individuals with damaged or nonexistent credit who need reliable transportation and can commit to regular payments over months or years. The primary caveat is that BHPH financing typically carries substantially higher total costs than traditional auto loans due to elevated interest rates and aggressive payment schedules; this is a lender of last resort for vehicle access, not a competitive financing alternative for credit-worthy borrowers.
services: In-house auto financing with down payments starting at $1,400
Used vehicle sales across trucks, vans, SUVs, crossovers, and classic automobiles
Online vehicle inventory browsing and virtual showroom access
Credit application and approval (stated as fast and easy process)
Vehicle locating assistance for specific models
Online payment processing for existing loans
